content:
- Finished bug-real-binary-provenance-enforcement-gaps end-to-end.
- Implemented fail-closed real-binary provenance enforcement via repo-tracked policy (tools/real-binaries-policy.json) + local attestation (.tools/real-binaries-attestation.json) and new verifier (src/test_harness/provenance.rs).
- Hardened installers:
  - tools/install-common.sh provides hardened command resolution (allowlist + validated symlink targets, preserves argv[0] semantics), atomic copy helper (used for etcd), and lock-protected attestation manifest merge.
  - tools/install-etcd.sh now uses hardened command paths, stricter curl flags, mktemp, and writes attestation with resolved_path_abs.
  - tools/install-postgres16.sh reverted to allowlisted symlink strategy for /usr/bin/* (copying broke initdb due to share/libdir relocation); adds rpm -V integrity check and writes attestation with resolved_path_abs.
- Updated harness to use provenance verifier for real-binary paths (src/test_harness/binaries.rs) and added deterministic negative-control unit tests for tampering.
- Added tools/trace-real-binary-execve.sh and committed execve evidence summary under .ralph/evidence/.../execve-summary.txt.
- Updated contributor docs (docs/src/contributors/testing-system.md, harness-internals.md) with provenance model + commands.
- Verified gates all green: make check, make test, make test-long, make lint.
- Switched task via .ralph/task_switch.sh, committed + pushed.
